title: Understanding Mental Health
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Mental health is (0) increasingly being recognised as equally important as physical health. Many people experience periods of feeling (17) anxious or low, especially during major life changes or periods of stress. Working in highly (18) stressful environments can have a serious impact on emotional wellbeing. People who are struggling should seek help from a (19) qualified counsellor or psychologist as soon as possible. Campaigns aimed at raising public (20) awareness have helped reduce the stigma associated with mental illness. Finding the right (21) treatment takes time, but early support usually leads to better outcomes. Many people show (22) reluctance to ask for help, fearing the judgement of others. Building (23) confidence through positive daily habits and social connections can make a real difference. With appropriate care, a full (24) recovery from many mental health conditions is entirely possible.

example.text: Mental health is (0) INCREASINGLY being recognised as equally important as physical health. (INCREASE)

questions.explanation: An adjective is needed after 'feeling'; 'anxiety' becomes 'anxious' by changing '-iety' to '-ious'.
An adjective is needed before 'environments'; 'stress' becomes 'stressful' by adding the suffix '-ful'.
An adjective is needed before 'counsellor'; 'qualify' becomes 'qualified' by changing '-fy' to '-fied'.
A noun is needed after 'public'; 'aware' becomes 'awareness' by adding the suffix '-ness'.
A noun is needed after 'the right'; 'treat' becomes 'treatment' by adding the suffix '-ment'.
A noun is needed after 'show'; 'reluctant' becomes 'reluctance' by changing '-ant' to '-ance'.
A noun is needed after 'Building'; 'confident' becomes 'confidence' by changing '-dent' to '-dence'.
A noun is needed after 'full'; 'recover' becomes 'recovery' by adding the suffix '-y'.
